resources.string: Use a password of at least 4 characters.
Local sign-in is on: no server call. Turn it off under More → Settings to use your API. Chat still needs a reachable server.
Server sign-in: the app calls your API (More → Settings for the URL). On a phone, use your PC\'s LAN IP, not 10.0.2.2.
API server: More → Settings. Release builds always use your server.
Debug builds only. Turn off to test real login against your backend.
Welcome to the Middin Innovatie app: collective memory, team chat, product ideas with camera capture, and tools for your custom API.
No products yet. Open Products and add one with the camera.
Curated links to regulators, knowledge institutes and example products. Always check each website for the latest information.
Add a note for the shared memory…
No products. Tap + to add a photo and details.
Camera permission is required for photos.
Photo captured. You can save the product below.
Planned rollouts and release notes for the team.

This app connects to your own backend for login and chat.

Security: use HTTPS in production. API keys for Gemini are stored on-device for convenience—prefer server-side AI for confidential data.

Features: collective memory (local database), REST chat, products with CameraX, ML Kit image labels as hints, Bluetooth paired devices, Google Gemini (optional), notifications test, EN/NL UI.

Middin Innovatie is based in Den Haag. We work on innovation, digital products, and collaboration with partners and colleagues.

This application bundles internal tools: shared memory, communication, product capture, and integrations (API, Gemini, Bluetooth) in one place.

For corporate identity, logos, and official press text, follow your internal brand guidelines.
People and teams behind this build. Edit the list in code (CreditsRepository) to match your organisation.
Uses Google Gemini (gemini-1.5-flash). Paste an API key from Google AI Studio under More → Settings. Keys stay on this device.
Shows classic Bluetooth devices already paired with this phone. For scanning or BLE workflows, extend this screen.
Bluetooth is not available on this device.
Grant Bluetooth connect permission to list paired devices.
From Google AI Studio. Stored in app preferences on this device only.
Leave empty and tap Use build default, or enter scheme, host and port (no path). Path prefix still comes from Gradle (API_PATH_PREFIX).
Release builds use minification. Never ship production secrets in the client; use HTTPS and server-side keys.
